## Description
Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.

## Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you'd like in detail.

## Use Case
What would this feature enable you to do?

## Example
```python
# How would you like to use this feature?
from socratic_rag import RAGClient

client = RAGClient()
# ... example usage of the new feature
```

## Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context
Any other context, diagrams, or references?

## Related Issues
Links to related issues or discussions.

## Checklist
- [ ] I've searched existing issues for similar requests
- [ ] This feature aligns with the project scope
- [ ] I've provided a clear use case
- [ ] I'm open to contributing this feature
